task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or an Odoo application interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the 'Training Time Off' configuration form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the form view for the 'Training Time Off' leave type. The breadcrumbs or header should display 'Time Off Types / Training Time Off'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the approval setting is configured for both the Employee's Approver and the Time Off Officer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration form, the 'Approval' (or 'Leave Validation') field is set to 'By Employee's Approver and Time Off Officer' (or equivalent wording for dual approval).

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Mitchell Admin' is designated as the Notified Time Off Officer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration form, the 'Notified Time Off Officer' (or 'Responsible Time Off Officer') field is set to 'Mitchell Admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the configuration changes have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form shows a saved state (e.g., a cloud icon with a checkmark, absence of an active 'Save' button, or the view has returned to the list view after editing).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Odoo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo UI, rather than terminal windows or API scripts executing commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or used to alter the HTML text of the page.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent modified the existing 'Training Time Off' record rather than creating a new dummy record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The breadcrumbs should indicate editing an existing record (e.g., not showing 'New' in the breadcrumbs before saving).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target leave type is 'Training Time Off'. The required validation type is 'both', which appears in the Odoo UI as 'By Employee's Approver and Time Off Officer'. The designated Time Off Officer must be 'Mitchell Admin'.
